Package io.vanslog.spring.data.meilisearch.repository.support

Class MeilisearchRepositoryFactory

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.repository.core.support.RepositoryFactorySupport
io.vanslog.spring.data.meilisearch.repository.support.MeilisearchRepositoryFactory
All Implemented Interfaces:
Aware, BeanClassLoaderAware, BeanFactoryAware
public class MeilisearchRepositoryFactory extends RepositoryFactorySupport
Factory to create SimpleMeilisearchRepository instances.
Author:
Junghoon Ban
